description: Composition Black jersey made of 100% polyester with ForMotion technology, has a cross over V-neck collar with piping, short sleeves with the adidas patented 3-Stripe running through it and printed branding on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Sweat it out in comfort on the tracks or at the gym in this jersey engineered with ForMotion technology from adidas. The ForMotion technology improves comfort and enhances performance by combining several different fabrics with different properties in a shaped garment. ForMotion garments are designed to enhance athletes' movements in three specific Sports: linear sports, lateral sports and helix movements of football/soccer. Pair it with adidas trackpants and running shoes for the best results. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
